branding.title: Branding
branding.logoUploadFailed: Could not upload the logo. Please try a different image.

emailTemplate.title: Email Template
emailTemplate.help: These appear on every email your team and customers receive — alongside your logo and brand color set above.

notifications.title: Notification Channels
notifications.help: In-app notifications always apply. Enable additional channels to also deliver them by email, SMS, or WhatsApp to users with a phone number on file.

invoices.title: Invoice History
invoices.empty: No invoices yet — one is issued automatically at the start of each billing period.

export.title: Download Backup
export.description: Download a complete snapshot of your company's data as a JSON file. Uploaded files (documents, logos, signatures) are not included — only the records that reference them.

restore.title: Restore from Backup
restore.warning: Restoring replaces ALL of your company's current data with the contents of the backup file. This cannot be undone.
restore.description: Only restore a backup that was downloaded from this same company. Restoring from a different company's backup is blocked automatically.
restore.error: Could not restore this backup. Please check the file and try again.

confirmDialog.title: Confirm Restore
confirmDialog.message: This will permanently replace all current data for {{company}} with the contents of this backup file. Type RESTORE to confirm.
